examples: His spectacles flashed a last gleam before he disappeared into the cavernous hallway.

In South Asia, this makes the car downright cavernous.
The space is large but not cavernous, each hallway leads where you expect it to lead.
For this, homeowners enjoy everything from fountain-studded courtyards to grand libraries and cavernous indoor pools.
